appraisal_events.evidence: docteur Cottard... pensa que... dire que j’étais un charmant garçon... ne pourrait en rien être utile pour moi et serait flatteur pour lui, deux raisons qui le décidèrent à parler de moi à Odette
appraisal_events.explanation: Cottard is portrayed as acting out of self-flattery rather than genuine help, diminishing him as a self-serving social operator.

status_effects.explanation: He appears less admirable because his intervention is motivated by vanity rather than the narrator’s interest.
